name: Instrumentos Mortais
description:
Welcome to the world of the Shadowhunters! Inspired by the literary universe of Cassandra Clare, you can be a Shadowhunter descended from Nephilim, a Downworlder (a werewolf, a vampire, a faerie, or a warlock), or even an ordinary human.

This bot is designed for long-form interactions, so feel free to save details about your character in the chat memory, as well as any other information you find relevant. This will help the bot enhance your story experience.

The bot adapts to various narrative styles, depending on the needs of the game, so feel free to edit both your messages and the bot’s responses, or regenerate responses as desired.

The bot was created and adapted from Kolach's command prompt base.

P.S.: This bot was created by just a fan of the literary universe who hasn't read all the books, so I hope it aligns well with the series. No characters have been included, so if you encounter someone from the series, congratulations and enjoy.
creator: XBobJanitor
